title: Manager, Talent Acquisition(9437) - Alexandra Hospital
description:
Alexandra Hospital is seeking an experienced and dynamic Talent Acquisition Manager to support the Talent Acquisition Head in helping the organisation hire fulfil the ramp up plans over the next few years.  This key position will work with the Head to develop plans to ensure timely and effective talent acquisition across the organization and be responsible for the implementation of these plans.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead and manage a team of 8, providing guidance, mentorship, and performance management.
  • Co develop and implement strategic talent acquisition plans to meet the organization's hiring needs.
  • Ensure operational excellence in all recruitment processes and procedures.
  • Stay abreast of industry trends and best practices in talent acquisition, continuously improving our recruitment strategies.
  • Analyze recruitment metrics and provide regular reports to senior management.
  • Foster relationships with stakeholders (internal and external) including hiring managers, agencies, educational institutes, etc.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
  • Minimum of 10 years of experience in talent acquisition or a similar role, preferably in healthcare or a related industry
  • Proven track record of leading and developing high-performing recruitment teams
  • Proven track record of fulfilling high acquisition volume. Strong understanding of recruitment best practices and trends
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  •  Demonstrated ability to develop and implement strategic hiring plans
  • Meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational skills
  • Proactive approach to problem-solving and decision-making

Personal Attributes:

  • Meticulous and detail-oriented
  • Proactive and self-motivated
  • Decisive and able to make tough decisions
  • Forward-thinking and adaptable to change
  • Strong leadership and team-building skills

postedCompany.description:
The National University Health System (NUHS) plays a key, contributing role in Singapore’s healthcare. Our versatile and experienced team of healthcare professionals has only one aim - to help people get better, and live healthier and longer lives.

We do this by improving medical care, lowering disease recurrence, producing better healthcare professionals, and turning research findings into better medical treatments for diseases that affect Singaporeans. And the reason we’re able to do these things is because we have the best and most dedicated people. Come join us and help shape medicine for our future.
postedCompany.name: NATIONAL UNIVERSITY HEALTH SYSTEM PTE. LTD.
